title: Localization of Workspace Templates in monday.com apps

posts.author: etapa-racional (Vítor Miguel Abreu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

When developing monday.com apps, it is not clear for me how the localization of the Workspace Templates works.

As far as I can understand we should add a translated Workspace Template for each supported language. Correct?

If you have a Portuguese template to show only in Portuguese speaking locales and an English template to show elsewhere, what “Locale Release” should be applied to the Portuguese template and what “Locale Release” should be applied to the English template?

Kind regards,
Vítor Miguel Abreu
